news.headline: Prima Asset Management partners with Australia's Schwartz Family Company for London hotel expansion.
news.summary: In a significant move, Prima Asset Management, a company headquartered in Singapore, has joined hands with the Schwartz Family Company, the biggest private hotel investor in Australia. This partnership aims to expedite Prima Asset Management's venture into the real estate market in London, which is recognized as one of the top destinations for hotel investments in Europe. The collaboration is set to strengthen the presence of both companies in the lucrative hotel industry, enhancing their capabilities to tap into new opportunities and capitalize on the flourishing market.

news.headline: Green Science Alliance in Japan created MOF, PCP from waste PET bottles, super-porous materials. Dec 20, 2024.
news.summary: In Kawanishi City, Japan, on December 20, 2024, it was reported that Metal organic frameworks (MOFs) or porous coordination polymers (PCPs) are composed of metal cations and organic ligands linking component metals. These materials are created as highly porous substances through modifications in their structure...

news.headline: Fed's Williams: I expect the slowdown in labor force growth to continue.
Fed's Williams: There is a lot of uncertainty around inflation.
Fed's Williams: There is a lot of uncertainty around future fiscal policy.
Tedmos introduces new range of rechargeable wireless lighting solutions: Puck Lights, Picture Lights, Ceiling Lights.
news.summary: Tedmos, a prominent home lighting company, based in San Diego, revealed their latest collection of rechargeable wireless lighting options on December 20, 2024. The new line includes Puck Lights, Picture Lights, and Ceiling Lights, offering consumers a wider range of choices for their lighting needs. The company is renowned for its effortless and elegant lighting solutions.

news.headline: Registration now open for NHS event on March 18-20, 2025 in Las Vegas featuring star-studded events and learning sessions. #HomeImprovement #NHS2025
news.summary: Registration is now available for an upcoming event hosted by the NHS in Las Vegas on December 20, 2024. The event will feature cooking demonstrations, star-studded events, new partnerships, learning sessions with industry leaders, and opportunities to network with colleagues. This event promises to be an exciting opportunity for professionals in the industry to connect and learn.

news.headline: León Y Sol Tequila launches LYS Artist Collective, a platform for emerging artists celebrating innovation and culture.
news.summary: León Y Sol Tequila is calling upon up-and-coming artists to participate in a fresh platform that recognizes innovation, teamwork, and cultural expression. The company, based in San Francisco, made the announcement on December 20, 2024. Known for its daring approach and dynamic style, the tequila brand introduces the LYS initiative to provide a stage for artists to showcase their talents and connect with like-minded individuals.

news.headline: Fed's Williams: We have seen good progress on inflation, but recent data is a touch higher.
Fed's Williams: The Fed will have to be data dependent as it sets policy.
Fed's Williams: For the next year expects growth to slow to 2%, steady unemployment rate.
Fed's Williams: Monetary policy is well positioned and is somewhat restrictive.
E Split Corp. will issue distributions for December 2024 to Class A shareholders. No specific amount mentioned.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, E Split Corp. (TSX: ENS, ENS.PR.A) shared that a distribution for December 2024 will be paid out to Class A shareholders. The exact amount of the distribution was not provided in the excerpt.

news.headline: InterCure has received NIS 66M for Nir Oz Facility recovery, potentially reaching NIS 107M for post-war expansion.CEO & key shareholders involved.
news.summary: There are plans to increase funding up to NIS 107 million to aid in the expansion of the facility in partnership with the "Tkumah" administration after the war. This funding will involve contributions from significant company stakeholders, such as CEO Alexander Rabinovich, along with primary investors like Yaron Yakobi.

news.headline: Viettel High Tech signs $1 million contract with High Cloud Technologies from UAE for 5G deployment in the Middle East.
news.summary: In Hanoi, Vietnam on December 20, 2024, Viettel High Tech (VHT) entered into a deal exceeding $1 million with High Cloud Technologies (HCT) based in the UAE. The agreement involves providing 5G systems for the Middle Eastern market. This significant contract signifies a strategic partnership between the two companies.

news.headline: iStorage receives FIPS 140-3 Level 3 validation for datAshur PRO+C & PRO+A encrypted flash drives, first in the world.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, in London, the renowned company iStorage, known for its hardware-encrypted data storage and cloud security solutions, has achieved a significant milestone. They proudly state that they are the first and sole company globally to receive the esteemed FIPS 140-3 Level 3 validation for a pair of encrypted USB flash drives. This validation signifies their dedication to top-tier security standards and their position as a leader in the industry.

news.headline: Redneck Blinds partners with Convoy of Hope for holiday charity giveaway of over $25,000 in prizes.
news.summary: Don't miss out on the opportunity to win part of more than $25,000 in prizes and support Convoy of Hope based in LAMAR, Mo. On December 20, 2024, Redneck® Outdoors, a top provider of hunting blinds and accessories, will be awarding over $25,000 in prizes to five fortunate winners.

news.headline: Researchers at Chungnam National University in South Korea have developed a rapid water quality monitoring chip to detect antibiotics amid antimicrobial resistance. Dec 20, 2024. AMR is a critical issue due to bacteria developing resistance to antibiotics.
news.summary: In Daejeon, South Korea, as of December 20, 2024, Antimicrobial resistance (AMR) has emerged as a significant global health concern due to microbes like bacteria developing resistance to antibiotics. The main contributing factor to this escalation is attributed to the improper utilization and disposal of antibiotics in the environment. This trend underscores the urgency of addressing the issue to prevent further proliferation of resistant strains.

news.headline: Dynamic Infrastructure introduces AI solution to predict infrastructure defects in concrete and steel, revolutionizing the industry.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on December 20, 2024, Dynamic Infrastructure (DiGlobal), a prominent player in deploying AI technology in civil infrastructure, introduced an innovative AI tool that can forecast concrete and steel defects' deterioration with precision. This cutting-edge solution marks a significant advancement in predictive maintenance for infrastructure projects worldwide.

news.headline: Fed's Williams: We will make sure the Fed gets inflation to 2%.
Fed's Williams: The economy is in good place.
Fed's Williams: The recent data consistent with the Fed's economic projections.
US PCE inflation gauge shows prices rising lower than expected by the Fed.
Fed's Williams: I am seeing encouraging news on the economy but journey has been bumpy - CNBC.
Sidus Space's LizzieSat™-2 to launch December 21, 2024 from Vandenberg Space Force Base in CA as part of Bandwagon-2 mission with SpaceX.
news.summary: A space mission by Sidus Space (NASDAQ: SIDU) named LizzieSat™-2 is set to launch on December 21, 2024, from Vandenberg Space Force Base in California as part of the Bandwagon-2 rideshare mission with SpaceX. Live updates on the mission will be provided on X (formerly Twitter) @SpaceX. This launch marks a milestone in Sidus' goal to offer innovative space solutions.

news.headline: Brenmiller Energy achieves ISO/IEC 27001 certification for information security, demonstrating commitment to industry standards.
news.summary: Tel Aviv, Israel-based company Brenmiller Energy Ltd. (Nasdaq: BNRG) has recently obtained the ISO/IEC 27001:2022 certification, which is recognized as the foremost global standard for Information Security Management Systems (ISMS). As a distinguished provider of thermal energy storage solutions to industrial and utility clients globally, this certification solidifies Brenmiller Energy's commitment to information security. ISO/IEC 27001:2022 is issued by the International Organization for Standardization (ISO), the world's primary independent standards developer.

news.headline: American Rare Earths Limited's subsidiary Wyoming Rare (USA) Inc secures facility in Laramie, Wyoming to support Halleck Creek Project.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, American Rare Earths Limited (ARR) shared that its subsidiary, Wyoming Rare (USA) Inc., has successfully obtained a facility at the Western Research Institute in Laramie, Wyoming. This advancement signals a crucial milestone in the company's plan to advance the Halleck Creek Rare Earths Project and bolster its operational capacities in the area. ARR is listed as ASX: ARR | OTCQX: ARRNF, AMRRY, and this recent development showcases their commitment to growth and progress.

news.headline: National Police Association backs the Lifesaving Gear for Police Act of 2024 (H.R. 9745) by Reps. Waltz and Moskowitz.
news.summary: The Lifesaving Gear for Police Act of 2024 (H.R. 9745), a bipartisan bill introduced by Reps. Michael Waltz and Jared Moskowitz, has gained the enthusiastic support of The National Police Association. This bill aims to provide vital equipment to police officers and has been well-received by officials representing FL-6 and FL-23. It seeks to enhance the safety and effectiveness of law enforcement by removing certain policies put in place during the Obama and Biden administrations.

news.headline: China's new Research Center for Sustainable Development empowers youth, promotes combating climate change with 'Pact for the Future.'
news.summary: In Wenzhou, China on December 20, 2024, global and national organizations are actively searching for ways to address the urgent issue of climate change. Leaders worldwide have embraced the 'Pact for the Future,' which encompasses a comprehensive global initiative. This initiative aims to tackle climate change by promoting sustainable practices and reducing carbon emissions on a massive scale. Through this pact, countries aim to achieve a significant reduction of 30% in global carbon emissions by 2030. This ambitious goal underscores the necessity for immediate and collaborative action to combat the impacts of climate change on a global scale.

news.headline: Pickleball Kingdom partners with PodPlay, bringing technology to 400 franchises. Major agreement in Phoenix.
news.summary: The world's largest indoor pickleball entity, Pickleball Kingdom, has recently signed a multi-year agreement with PodPlay, a provider of cutting-edge technology solutions. This collaboration will see PodPlay's leading technology being integrated into almost 400 Pickleball Kingdom franchises. The partnership, unveiled in Phoenix on Dec. 20, 2024, signals a significant advancement for both companies and the pickleball community at large.

news.headline: TKH Security's Park Assist Solution introduced on Dec. 20, 2024, aims to enhance retail safety with innovative parking and crime prevention tech.
news.summary: TKH Security has introduced the Park Assist Solution, a pioneering technology designed to enhance safety in retail settings by offering innovative parking solutions and crime prevention measures. Launched in Cheshire, Connecticut on December 20, 2024, this cutting-edge system aims to address the challenges faced in busy shopping centers. By employing state-of-the-art technology, it provides a seamless parking experience for shoppers while also bolstering security measures. This advancement in retail safety is poised to make a significant impact, offering a safer environment for both shoppers and businesses.

news.headline: Traders of rate futures keep bets on Fed pause in January, add to bets on rate cut in March, with one more cut seen by October.
Lucky Strike Entertainment opens a 6th location in Ladera Ranch, CA on Dec 21, 2024, the 2nd one in CA this month.
news.summary: Lucky Strike Entertainment, a top operator of entertainment venues, revealed the launch of Lucky Strike Ladera Ranch in Orange County, California. It is set to open to the public on December 21, 2024. This marks the sixth newly constructed Lucky Strike location to open in the current year. Additionally, it is the second new site unveiled in California this month, following Lucky Strike Beverly Hills. The company is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol LUCK.

news.headline: YY Group's YY Smart Tech forms new partnerships to drive digital transformation in Asia. Subsidiary expands services in Singapore.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, YY Group Holding Limited (NASDAQ: YYGH) shared that its subsidiary, YY Smart Tech (YYST), is enhancing collaborations with top solution providers and system integrators to provide advanced services to clients in Singapore and Asia. This move aims to improve the company's services and reach a wider audience in the region.

news.headline: Adam Trainor named interim CFO at Onfolio Holdings Inc.
BEN and Cataneo partner for AI pilot program with Vybroo and Grupo Siete to modernize Mexico's radio ads.
news.summary: Today in Jackson, Wyoming, Brand Engagement Network, Inc. (NASDAQ: BNAI) and Cataneo GmbH partnered to launch a joint pilot program with Vybroo and Grupo Siete. The program focuses on revolutionizing Mexico's radio advertising sector. Brand Engagement Network, Inc. is renowned for its conversational AI solutions, while Cataneo GmbH is a media technology company based in Munich. This collaboration brings together their expertise to drive innovation in Mexico's radio advertising industry.

news.headline: Banzai acquires Vidello, boosting TTM revenue by 59% to $17.3M and EBITDA by $2.3M, expanding into video creation.
news.summary: Banzai has announced plans to broaden its portfolio by integrating Vidello, a cutting-edge platform for video creation, editing, and marketing. This strategic move aims to enhance Banzai's offering and cater to the increasing demand for video content solutions. With Vidello's advanced features, users can expect improved video creation and editing capabilities, as well as more effective marketing tools. The integration with Vidello is set to bolster Banzai's position in the market and provide users with a comprehensive suite for all their video needs.

news.headline: US short-term interest-rate futures jump after consumer spending, PCE inflation report.
TC BioPharm advances ACHIEVE Phase 2b trial with final dosing of 3 patients in Edinburgh, Scotland, as of Dec. 20, 2024.
news.summary: In Edinburgh, Scotland, on December 20, 2024, TC BioPharm (Holdings) PLC, also known as TC BioPharm, a company listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol TCBP, revealed its development of allogeneic gamma-delta T cell therapies for cancer and other medical conditions. The company disclosed information regarding 3 patients during its announcement.

news.headline: Endevica Bio initiates Phase 2 trial of peptide drug TCMCB07 to prevent weight loss in stage 4 colorectal cancer patients undergoing chemotherapy.
news.summary: Endevica Bio, a private company based in NORTHBROOK, Ill., announced on Dec. 20, 2024, that they will be providing the peptide TCMCB07 to patients with stage 4 metastatic colorectal cancer who are undergoing chemotherapy treatment. This peptide is a first-of-its-kind drug candidate.

news.headline: Shapellx donates $30,000 worth of products to HELP NOW, supporting women in need.
news.summary: In an effort to bring comfort and positivity to those in need during the holiday season, Shapellx, a prominent shapewear company based in Orlando, Florida, contributed products worth $30,000 to HELP NOW. This organization focuses on empowering women to break free from violence and create safe environments for themselves.

news.headline: Win a free Vegas poker vacation in the WSOP 2025 Kickoff Sweepstakes by downloading the free WSOP app. Article from HERZLIYA, Israel on Dec. 20, 2024.
news.summary: Poker fans have the exciting opportunity to grab the WSOP free-to-play app where they can potentially secure a complimentary poker trip to Las Vegas. This incredible offer comes from Playtika's World Series of Poker (WSOP) and could turn the quiet period between the winter festivities and New Year into a rewarding experience. Don't miss out on this chance to download the app for a shot at winning a free Vegas poker vacation. This information was announced in Herzliya, Israel on December 20, 2024. Get involved now for a shot at the ultimate Vegas poker experience with WSOP.

news.headline: Medicilon names Dr. Lilly Xu as CTO with 30+ years in preclinical drug dev. Dec 20, 2024 Boston.
news.summary: In Boston on December 20, 2024, Medicilon, a prominent preclinical contract research organization, announced the appointment of Dr. Lilly Xu as their new Chief Technology Officer. Dr. Xu, bringing with her more than 30 years of expertise in preclinical drug development, will now oversee Medicilon's technological initiatives and advancements.

news.headline: US commercial property insurance rates improving, stable growth expected, per new Triple-I Brief.
news.summary: In Malvern, Pennsylvania, recent data indicates positive developments in the U.S. commercial property insurance sector, particularly in terms of rates. The industry seems to be entering a phase of improvement and is poised for continued growth.

news.headline: Horizon Space Acquisition I Corp. announces revised contribution to trust account in proposal amendment, Dec. 20, 2024.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, Horizon Space Acquisition I Corp. (NASDAQ: HSPO) revealed changes for its upcoming extraordinary general meeting of shareholders instead of an annual one. The amendments pertain to the Company's charter and trust agreement. The Meeting will address the MAA Amendment Proposal and Trust Amendment Proposal, with revised terms that will impact shareholders. This development signifies a significant adjustment in the Company's governance structure and financial operations. The amendments are crucial for the future direction of Horizon Space Acquisition I Corp. and will be voted on at the forthcoming extraordinary general meeting on the specified date.

news.headline: TruGolf and D3 Sports Tech to collaborate on revolutionizing golf simulation with more realistic and exciting experiences.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, in Salt Lake City, Utah, TruGolf Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: TRUG), a prominent golf tech firm, revealed a forthcoming strategic partnership with D3 Sports Tech. This collaboration aims to revolutionize gameplay by incorporating peer-to-peer skills-based wagering for sports. The focus will be on introducing innovations that elevate the realism and thrill of gaming experiences.

news.headline: Rezolve Ai wraps up 2024 with major milestones, strategic partnerships, and financial strength, gearing up for success in 2025.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, Rezolve Ai (NASDAQ: RZLV) looks back on a significant year marked by growth and innovation. The company has forged key partnerships, improved its financial standing, and gained considerable market acclaim. As a trailblazer in the retail AI sector, Rezolve Ai concludes the year robustly, anticipating considerable achievements in 2025.

news.headline: Ferrellgas Partners, L.P. (OTC: FGPR) reports Q1 2025 results as of Oct 31, 2024 from Liberty, MO.
news.summary: In Liberty, Missouri on December 20, 2024, Ferrellgas Partners, L.P. (OTC: FGPR) announced its financial performance for the first quarter of fiscal year 2025, concluding on October 31, 2024.

news.headline: Enovix ships EX-2M samples to customers, showing 10% higher energy density than EX-1M. EX-2M to launch in 2026.
news.summary: FREMONT, California - December 20, 2024 - Enovix Corporation (Nasdaq: ENVX), a leading Silicon Valley battery manufacturer, revealed a significant achievement by sending out second-generation EX-2M samples to clients produced at its Malaysian Fab 2 facility. These samples exhibited a remarkable 10% increase in energy density compared to the EX-1M models set for large-scale production in Malaysia in 2025. The EX-2M release is anticipated in 2026, solidifying Enovix’s position as an industry leader in energy density within the smartphone sector.

news.headline: Actelis Networks launches MetaShield, an AI-based cybersecurity solution as part of its Cyber Aware Networking strategy.
news.summary: Actelis introduces MetaShield as a component of its distinct Cyber Aware Networking approach, representing a major achievement for the company.
